art_highlights: Global art sales reached $59.6 billion in 2025, up 4%, showing signs of stabilization.
US market remains dominant with 44% share; auction sales rebounded by 23% in 2025.
Shift back towards in-person channels for high-value transactions; online sales saw a decline.
Outlook for 2026 is cautiously optimistic despite geopolitical instability and rising costs.

market_trends.summary: Global markets rallied on March 25, 2026, due to hopes of de-escalation in West Asia.
key_points: Oil prices fell sharply amid de-escalation hopes; Brent crude down 1% to $98.92.
US stock futures climbed across major indices (Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, Dow) on Wednesday morning.
Asia-Pacific markets showed strong gains, with Japan's Nikkei rising 2.87%.
Gold rebounded to near $4,600 an ounce, indicating safe-haven interest remains strong.
